items.title: Hedera Gets Its First ETF: Canary's HBAR Fund Lets Investors Tap Into The Tokenization Boom
items.description: Canary Capital Group’s new fund, the Canary HBAR ETF (NASDAQ:HBR), launched on Oct 28, marking a significant expansion of investors’ access to digital assets outside of Bitcoin and Ethereum.

items.title: Jim Cramer Says D-Wave Quantum CEO “Dr. Baratz is Very Good”
items.description: D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE:QBTS) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer shed light on. Answering a caller’s query about the stock, Cramer said: “Alright, I see QBTS. Now, they do report this week… I think that Dr. Baratz is very good. But this IBM is doing some amazing things in quantum, and I think the […]
